---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature, command, expert persona, or improvement
title: "feat: <short description>"
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-discussion"]
assignees: []
---

## Feature Summary

<!-- A clear, one-sentence summary of the feature you're requesting. -->


## Problem This Solves

<!-- What problem does this solve? What frustration or gap does it address?
     Example: "When I run 'npx gatebreaker roadmap', I can't filter by track — it always generates all three." -->


## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.
     Include example commands, expected output, or UI changes if applicable. -->

**Example command (if applicable):**
```bash
npx gatebreaker 
```

**Expected output:**
```
<!-- What should the user see? -->
```

## Feature Category

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] 🆕 New CLI command
- [ ] 🧙 New expert persona (see CONTRIBUTING.md for requirements)
- [ ] 🗺️ New career track (Offensive, Defensive, GRC, Cloud, Bug Bounty, etc.)
- [ ] 🌐 New LLM provider support
- [ ] 📊 Improvement to gap analysis / scoring
- [ ] 🎨 Landing page / HTML output improvement
- [ ] 📖 Documentation / README improvement
- [ ] ⚙️ Developer experience / tooling
- [ ] 🔒 Security enhancement
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered. -->


## Additional Context

<!-- Add any mockups, references, screenshots (text preferred), or relevant links.
     If proposing a new expert, include links to their documented philosophy. -->


## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this is not a duplicate
- [ ] This feature aligns with Gatebreaker's core mission (honest, practical cybersecurity career guidance)
- [ ] I am willing to help implement this (optional but appreciated)
